Divides the empire's succession between: Ya raba gadon daular tsakanin 'ya'yansa maza, al-Amin da al-Ma'mun, wanda ya kafa fagen rikicin gaba.
Orders the arrest of the powerful Barmak: Ya ba da umarnin kama dangi mai karfi na Barmakid, wanda ya kawo karshen tasirinsu a fada.
Dies in Tus (Khorasan, modern-day Iran): Ya mutu a Tus (Khorasan, Iran ta yanzu) lokacin da yake kan tafiyar soja don kwantar da bore.
Established the 'Bayt al-Hikma' in Baghd: Ya kafa 'Bayt al-Hikma' a Baghdad, babban dakin karatu da cibiyar fassara wanda ya zama cibiyar Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.
His reign saw unprecedented advancements: Mulkinsa ya ga ci gaba da ba a taba gani ba a kimiyya, likitanci, lissafi, da falsafa, wanda ya janyo masana daga daukacin duniya.
Initiated one of the first major diploma: Ya kaddamar da daya daqun manyan canje-canje na diflomasiyya na farko tsakanin duniyar Musulunci da Yammacin Turai, ciki har da shahararriyar kyautar giwa mai suna Abul-Abbas.
Was Harun al-Rashid really like his char: Shin Harun al-Rashid ya kasance kamar siffarsa a cikin 'Duniya Dubu da Daya' (One Thousand and One Nights)?
The tales are fictionalized and romantic: Labaran na bogi ne da kuma kayatarwa. Kodayake an san ni da yawo a kan titunan Baghdad a boye don koyo game da mutanena, labaran ban mamaki kirkirar adabi ne wadanda ke nuna wadatar zamanina.
It was a major intellectual center durin: Ta kasance babbar cibiyar ilimi lokacin mulkina a Baghdad. Ta fara ne a matsayin dakin karatuna na kashin kansa amma ta zama jami'a ta jama'a da cibiyar fassara inda aka fassara rubuce-rubucen Girka, Farsi, da na India zuwa Larabci, yana kiyaye da kuma fadada ilimi.
Why did the Barmakid family fall from po: Me yasa dangin Barmakid suka rasa iko?
The Barmakids, my trusted viziers, had a: Barmakids, viziers dina da na amince da su, sun tara babban iko da dukiya. Rushewarsu ba zato ba tsammani a shekarar 803 kila ya faru ne saboda burina na karfafa ikona da kuma rage tasirinsu, kodayake ainihin dalilan sun kasance batun muhawara ta tarihi.
Born Shams-ud-Din Mohammad Hafez-e Shira: An haifi Shams-ud-Din Mohammad Hafez-e Shirazi a Shiraz, Persia.
The Muzaffarid dynasty captures Shiraz,: Daular Muzaffarid ta kwace Shiraz, wanda ya shafi matsayin Hafez da goyon bayansa a fada.
Shah Shuja, a patron of poetry, restores: Shah Shuja, mai tallafa wa waka, ya maido da Hafez ga matsayinsa a fada bayan lokacin rashin goyon baya.
Falls from favor again and may have ente: Ya sake rasa goyon baya kuma kila ya shiga lokacin gudun hijira daga Shiraz.
Timur (Tamerlane) conquers Shiraz. A leg: Timur (Tamerlane) ya ci Shiraz da yaki. Shahararren taro, kodayake kila na bogi ne, ya faru tsakanin mawaƙin da mai cin kasa da yaki.
Dies in Shiraz and is buried in the Musa: Ya mutu a Shiraz sannan aka binne shi a Musalla Gardens. Kabarinsa yanzu ya zama alamar kasa da kuma wurin ziyara.
His collection of poems, primarily in th: Tarin wakokinsa, musamman a cikin tsarin ghazal, ana kallon sa a matsayin kololuwar adabin Farsi da kuma alamar al'ada.
He perfected the Persian lyric poetic fo: Ya inganta tsarin waka na lyric na Farsi, watau ghazal, inda ya cika shi da zurfin sufanci da kuma matakan ma'ana da ba a taba gani ba.
His poetry is used for divination (Fal-e: Ana amfani da wakokinsa don duba (Fal-e Hafez) sannan ta kasance da tsakiya ga al'ada, ilimi, da asalin Iran.
It is a pen name meaning 'The Memorizer': Suna ne na bogi mai nufin 'Mai Hadace Alkur'ani' (The Memorizer) ko 'Mai Tsaro,' wanda a al'adance ake ba wa wanda ya hadace daukacin Alkur'ani da rai.
Is his poetry about earthly love or divi: Shin wakarsa a kan soyayyar duniya ce ko kuwa soyayya ta Allah?
It's famously ambiguous. Terms like 'bel: Tana da sarkakiya shahararriya. Kalmomi kamar 'masoyi,' 'giya,' da 'gidan giya' ana fassara su a matsayin dadin duniya na zahiri da kuma alamar Sufanci ta ruhaniya ga Allah, farin ciki na ruhaniya, da kuma wurin bauta na gaskiya.
It is a tradition of divination where Ir: Tana zama al'ada ta duba inda mutanen Iran, suna neman jagoranci ko fahimta, ke yin tambaya sannan su bude Divan na Hafez a shafi na bazata, suna fassara wakar a matsayin amsa.
Did Hafez really meet the conqueror Timu: Shin da gaske Hafez ya hadu da mai cin kasa da yaki Timur?
There is a famous legend about their mee: Akwai wata tatsuniya mai shahara game da haduwarsu, inda Hafez ya amsa sukar da Timur ya yi wa wakarsa cikin wayo. Kodayake labari ne mai karfi, mafi yawan masana tarihi suna kallon sa a matsayin na bogi.
An haife ta a Constantinople, Daular Usmaniyya.
Graduated from the American College for: Ta kammala karatu a American College for Girls da ke Constantinople.
Divorced her first husband, Salih Zeki,: Ta rabu da mijinta na farko, Salih Zeki, saboda matakinsa na auren mace ta biyu.
Delivered her famous speech at the Sulta: Ta gabatar da shahararren kalaman ta a zanga-zangar Sultanahmet yaki da mamayar Allied.
Fled to Anatolia to join the Turkish Nat: Ta gudu zuwa Anatolia don shiga Yunkurin Kasa na Turkish (Turkish National Movement); ta yi aiki a Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish.
Lived in self-imposed exile in Europe an: Ta zauna a gudun hijira na kashin kanta a Turai da Amurka saboda rashin amincewa ta siyasa da sabuwar gwamnati.
Returned to Turkey after Atatürk's death: Ta koma Turkey bayan mutuwar Atatürk.
Elected as a member of the Grand Nationa: An zabe ta a matsayin mamba na Grand National Assembly ta Turkey.
Pioneering Turkish Novelist: Mawallafiyar Littattafai na Turkish ta Majagaba
Authored novels like \"The Shirt of Flam: Ta rubuta littattafai masu tasiri kamar 'The Shirt of Flame' da kuma 'The Clown and His Daughter', wadanda suka binciki jigogin asalin kasa da ayyukan mata.
Served as a corporal and sergeant on the: Ta yi aiki a matsayin corporal da sergeant a layin gaba, wanda ya mayar da ita babban alamar tirjiya ta kasa.
Leading Feminist and Activist: Babban Feminist da mai fada a kan hakki
Was one of the first graduates of her co: Ta kasance daya daqun daliban farko da suka kammala karatu a jami'arta sannan mai fada na tsawon rayuwa a kan ilimin mata da hakki a Turkey.
Was elected to the Turkish Parliament in: An zabe ta a Majalisar Dokoki ta Turkey a shekarar 1950, inda ta ci gaba da aikin jama'a a jamhuriyar da ta taimaka wajen samarwa.
Why is she considered a feminist icon?: Me yasa ake kallon ta a matsayin alamar feminism?
She divorced her husband for attempting: Ta rabu da mijinta saboda kokarin auren mace fiye da daya, ta fadi a kan ilimin mata, sannan littattafanta sun nuna mata masu karfi da zaman kansu, suna kalubalantar tsarin maza na zamaninta.
Did she really fight as a soldier?: Shin da gaske ta yi yaki a matsayin soja?
Yes. During the Turkish War of Independe: E. Lokacin Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish, an shigar da ita a hukumance sannan ta yi aiki a matsayin corporal da kuma daga baya sergeant, musamman a bangaren gudanarwa da na lafiya kusa da layin gaba.
Why did she go into exile after helping: Me yasa ta tafi gudun hijira bayan ta taimaka wajen kafa Jamhuriyar?
She and her husband disagreed with what: Ita da mijinta ba su yarda da abin da suka kalla a matsayin tsarin mulkin kama-karya mai girma na gwamnatocin Mustafa Kemal Atatürk ba. Sun zabi gudun hijira na kashin kansu don kauce wa tsanantawa ta siyasa.
Ascends to the throne of Babylon after t: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Babylon bayan mahaifinsa, Sin-Muballit ya sauka.
Ya ci biranen Isin da Uruk da yaki.
Defeats a coalition of enemies and conqu: Ya kayar da hadakar abokan gaba sannan ya ci masarautar Larsa mai karfi da yaki, wanda ya fadada daularsa sosai.
Conquers the kingdom of Mari, securing c: Ya ci masarautar Mari da yaki, wanda ya tabbatar da ikonsa a kan mafi yawan Mesopotamia.
Establishes the Code of Hammurabi on a d: Ya kafa Dokokin Hammurabi (Code of Hammurabi) a kan wani bango na diorite, wanda aka nuna shi ga jama'a a Babylon.
Dies after a reign of 42 years, and is s: Ya mutu bayan ya yi mulki na shekaru 42, inda dansa Samsu-iluna ya gaje shi.
Created one of the world's earliest and: Ya samar da daya daqun tsarin dokoki na farko da suka fi cika da aka rubuta, wanda ya kafa ka'idojin adalci da tsari ga daularsa.
Transformed Babylon from a minor city-st: Ya sauya Babylon daga karamar kasar birni zuwa babbar daula mai kula da fertile crescent ta hanyar cin kasa da yaki da kuma diflomasiyya.
Public Works and Infrastructure: Ayyukan Jama'a da Ababen More Rayuwa
Oversaw major projects including the exp: Ya kula da manyan ayyuka da suka hada da fadada magudanan ruwa (canals) don ban ruwa da kuma karfafa bangon birni, wanda ya inganta noma da tsaro.
Was 'an eye for an eye' applied to every: Shin an aiwatar da dokar 'ido ga ido' ga kowa daidai a cikin Dokokin Hammurabi?
No, the punishments varied based on the: A'a, hukumcin ya bambanta bisa ga matsayin al'umma na wanda ya yi laifin da kuma wanda aka yi wa laifin. Laifi yaki da mutum mai daraja yana samun hukumci mai tsanani fiye da laifi guda yaki da talaka ko bawa.
Was Hammurabi the first king to write do: Shin Hammurabi ne sarki na farko da ya rubuta dokoki?
No, earlier law codes like the Code of U: A'a, akwai tsarin dokoki na farko kamar na Ur-Nammu da suka wanzu. Sai dai, dokar Hammurabi ta fi fadi, tsari, sannan an kiyaye ta da kyau, wanda hakan ya mayar da ita mafi shahara daga ancient Near East.
What happened to Hammurabi's empire afte: Menene ya faru da daular Hammurabi bayan mutuwarsa?
The empire began to decline under his su: Daular ta fara raguwa karkashin magajinsa, Samsu-iluna. Ta fuskanci bore a ciki da kuma matsin lamba na waje, a karshe ta takaita sannan ta fada hannun maharba, amma gadon al'ada da na doka na Hammurabi ya dawwama na tsawon karni da dama.
Born as Aleksandra Lisowska in Ruthenia,: An haife ta a matsayin Aleksandra Lisowska a Ruthenia, Masarautar Poland (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Captured by Crimean Tatars and brought t: Crimean Tatars ne suka kama ta sannan suka kawo ta Constantinople, inda ta shiga Imperial Harem na Sultan Suleiman.
Gives birth to her first son, Şehzade Me: Ta haifi danta na farko, Şehzade Mehmed, wanda ya karfafa matsayinta a cikin harem.
Suleiman frees and legally marries Hurre: Suleiman ya yanta sannan ya auri Hurrem a hukumance, wanda ya mayar da ita Haseki Sultan, al'amari da ba a taba gani ba.
Her rival, Grand Vizier Pargalı Ibrahim: Abokin hamayyarta, Grand Vizier Pargalı Ibrahim Pasha, an kashe shi. Mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yarda cewa ta yi tasiri a kan wannan yanke shawara.
Begins construction of the Haseki Sultan: Ta fara ginin Haseki Sultan Complex a Constantinople, babban gidauniya na sadaka.
Suleiman's firstborn son, Şehzade Mustaf: An kashe dan fari na Suleiman, watau Şehzade Mustafa a kan zargin cin amana. Ana kallon Hurrem a matsayin wadda ta tsara rushewarsa don tabbatar da karagar mulki ga 'ya'yanta maza.
Dies in the Topkapi Palace and is buried: Ta mutu a Topkapi Palace sannan aka binne ta a wani kabari na sarki kusa da na Suleiman a Süleymaniye Mosque.
Became the first imperial consort to be: Ta zama mata ta farko ta sarki da aka aura a hukumance ga Sultan, wanda ya rushe al'adar Ottoman ta karni da dama.
Political Advisor and Diplomat: Mai Ba da Shawara kan Siyasa da Jakada
Acted as Sultan Suleiman's chief politic: Ta yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara kan siyasa ga Sultan Suleiman sannan ta tafiyar da alakar diflomasiyya da kasashen waje, ciki har da Poland da Persia.
Commissioned numerous major public build: Ta ba da umarnin gina manyan gine-gine na jama'a da dama, ciki har da Haseki Sultan Complex, wanda ya samar da ayyuka ga al'umma.
Her unprecedented power established a ne: Ikonta da ba a taba gani ba ya kafa sabon zamani inda mata na sarki suka sami babban tasiri na siyasa.
\"Roxelana\" was a European nickname mea: 'Roxelana' ya kasance lakabi na Turai mai nufin 'Ruthenian,' yana nuni ga asalinta. 'Hurrem' shi ne sunan da Suleiman ya ba ta, daga kalmar Farsi 'Khurram,' wadda ke nufin 'mai farin ciki.'
Why was her marriage to Suleiman so sign: Me yasa auren ta da Suleiman yake da matukar mahimmanci?
For over a century, Ottoman sultans had: Fiye da karni daya, sarakunan Ottoman ba su auri mata a hukumance ba, a maimakon haka suna dogara ne da mata na bauta (concubines) don samun magada. Aurenta ya daga matsayinta sama da sauran mata daukacin su sannan ya ba ta tsaro da halacci da ba a taba gani ba.
Was she really as ruthless as she is oft: Shin da gaske ba ta da tausayi kamar yadda ake yawan kwatanta ta?
She was a shrewd political operator who: Ta kasance kwararriyar mai gudanar da siyasa wadda ta kawar da abokan hamayya don kare kanta da kuma makomar 'ya'yanta. Duk da cewa ana yin muhawara kan matakin 'rashin tausayi' nata, an dauki matakan ne a cikin yanayi mai zafi na siyasar gado inda asarar galibi take zama mutuwa.
How did she influence the succession to: Yaya ta yi tasiri a kan gadon karagar mulki?
By allegedly engineering the downfall of: Ta hanyar zargin tsara rushewar 'ya'ya maza na Suleiman mafi kwarewa daga sauran mata (Mustafa da Bayezid), ta bude Hasse ga danta mara kwarewa sosai, Selim II, don ya zama Sultan, wani al'amari da wasu masana tarihi ke cewa ya nuna farkon raguwar Daular.
Born Thomas Edward Lawrence in Tremadog,: An haifi Thomas Edward Lawrence a Tremadog, Wales.
Studies Modern History at Jesus College,: Ya yi karatun Tarihi na Zamani (Modern History) a Jesus College, Oxford, sannan ya yi tafiya ta kafa a Syria don yin bincike a kan sansanonin Crusaders don thesis dinsa.
World War I begins; he is assigned to th: Yakin Duniya na Farko ya fara; an tura shi zuwa bangaren labarin kasa na General Staff a London sannan kuma daga baya zuwa military intelligence a Alkahira.
Joins the Arab Revolt as a British liais: Ya shiga cikin Bore na Larabawa (Arab Revolt) a matsayin jami'in hulda na Birtaniya ga sojojin Emir Faisal.
Leads a small Arab force in a daring des: Ya jagoranci sojojin Larabawa kalilan a wata tafiya ta ban mamaki ta daji don kwace tashar jiragen ruwa ta Aqaba mai dabarar yaki wadda Ottoman ke rike da ita.
Participates in the capture of Damascus,: Ya shiga cikin kwace Damascus, babban nasara ga sojojin Allied da na Larabawa.
Serves as an advisor to Emir Faisal's Ar: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga wakilan Larabawa na Emir Faisal a Taron Zaman Lafiya na Paris (Paris Peace Conference), inda ya ji takaicin sakamakon.
Enlists in the Royal Air Force under the: Ya shiga Royal Air Force karkashin sunan bogi John Hume Ross don kauce wa shahararsa.
Publishes a private, subscribers-only ed: Ya buga wani siffa na kashin kansa na littafinsa na tarihi na yakin, 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom'.
Dies at the age of 46 from injuries sust: Ya mutu yana da shekaru 46 sakamakon raunukan da ya samu a hatsarin babur a Dorset, Ingila.
Role in the Arab Revolt: Rawarsa a cikin Bore na Larabawa (Arab Revolt)
Played a crucial role as a military stra: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin mai tsara dabarun soja da jami'in hulda, inda ya hada kabilun Larabawa daban-daban yaki da Daular Usmaniyya lokacin Yakin Duniya na Farko (WWI).
Led a daring desert march to capture the: Ya jagoranci tafiyar daji ta ban mamaki don kwace babbar tashar jiragen ruwa ta Aqaba daga bangarenta na kasa mara kariya, babban nasara ta dabarar yaki.
Authored an epic and introspective memoi: Ya rubuta tarihin yakin mai ban mamaki da zurfin tunani wanda ake kallo a matsayin classic na adabin Turanci da tarihin soja.
Was 'Lawrence of Arabia' his real name?: Shin 'Lawrence na Arabia' (Lawrence of Arabia) ne ainihin sunansa?
A'a, sunansa Thomas Edward Lawrence. 'Lawrence of Arabia' ya kasance lakabi ne da dan jaridar Amurka Lowell Thomas ya yada shi, wanda rubuce-rubucensa da lakocinsa suka mayar da Lawrence shahararre a daukacin duniya.
Why did he join the military under a fak: Me yasa ya shiga aikin soja karkashin sunan bogi bayan yakin?
He sought to escape the pressures and sc: Ya nemi kauce wa matsin lamba da binciken shahararsa. Yana son rashin shahara da kuma tsayayyen rayuwa ta soja ta talakawa.
Did he succeed in securing Arab independ: Shin ya yi nasarar tabbatar da 'yancin kan Larabawa?
While the revolt was a military success,: Kodayake boren ya kasance nasara ta soja, a karshe ya ji takaici sakamakon Yarjejeniyar Sykes-Picot (Sykes-Picot Agreement), yarjejeniya ta sirri tsakanin Birtaniya da Faransa wadda ta raba Gabas ta Tsakiya zuwa sassan tasiri, wanda ya yaudari alkawuran kafa kasar Larabawa dunkulalliya.
What is 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom' about?: Game da menene 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom'?
